title: Garden Route Dam level update
description: GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update, supplied by George Municipality on Tuesday 22 October:

- Dam level: 86,77%Compared to 87.94% on 15 October
- Compared to 87.94% on 15 October
- Rainfall: 20.5 mm (Measured rainfall figures from 15 - 21 October)Compared to 4.5mm on 15 October
- Compared to 4.5mm on 15 October

For water-saving tips please visit here.


> The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
